nasb.text: Heap on the wood, kindle the fire, Boil the flesh well And mix in the spices, And let the bones be burned.

esv.text: Heap on the logs, kindle the fire, boil the meat well, mix in the spices, and let the bones be burned up.

cnv.text: 你要多加柴枝，點上火， 混和香料， 把肉煮爛， 使骨頭燒焦；

ccb.text: 添在火上，燃起旺火，把肉煮烂，加入香料，烧焦骨头。
